Hero.label: RELIABLE LOGISTICS PARTNER AT TÀ LÙNG INTERNATIONAL BORDER GATE
Hero.title:
CONNECTING BORDERS
REACHING THE WORLD
Hero.subtitle: With over 15 years of experience in warehouse operations, customs procedures, and international transportation, we deliver fast, safe, and cost-optimized clearance solutions for businesses.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Over 15 years building logistics solutions at Tà Lùng International Border Gate

intro.title: OVERVIEW
intro.content:
Phú Anh Trading and Transportation Co., Ltd (brand: Tà Lùng Logistics) was established in 2008. As trade between Vietnam and China through Tà Lùng International Border Gate - Cao Bằng province intensified, the company invested in a system of warehouses and collection points for import-export goods in the area.

The company specializes in: Warehousing; Truck terminals; Import-export; Logistics; International road transportation.

AboutPage.missionText: Our mission is to provide transparent, efficient, and sustainable logistics solutions. Our vision is to become a key hub connecting China-Vietnam trade.

timeline.stage1_text: Established Phú Anh Trading and Transportation Co., Ltd, beginning border trade transportation operations.
timeline.stage2_text: Completed investment in a system of 3 yards (25 ha), meeting high-standard storage and transloading needs.
timeline.stage3_text: Establish an integrated service chain between Tà Lùng - Chi Ma, becoming a key China-Vietnam trade hub.

facilities.warehouseContent: We own 3 main yards: Phú Anh, Vũ Thành, and Sơn Cảng, with a total area of up to 25 hectares. We meet all storage and transloading needs with the highest standards.
facilities.transportContent: We provide a diverse fleet suitable for every customer need. Our trucks offer a wide range of load capacities, ensuring multimodal transportation requirements are met.

3.title: Arrange Vehicles
3.desc: Receive and arrange vehicles to the transloading area

5.title: Completion
5.desc: Complete vehicle procedures and hand over goods

vision.title: DEVELOPMENT DIRECTION
vision.content:
Currently, we are in the phase of completing infrastructure, focusing on building high-standard warehouses and logistics facilities.

Our long-term goal is to fully integrate business operations into the border gate system formed by Tà Lùng and Chi Ma, establishing an integrated border service chain along the Vietnam-China border. Tà Lùng Logistics will become a vital node connecting China-Vietnam trade.

ServiceDetail.ctaTitle: Ready to optimize your supply chain?

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
WhyChooseUs.point1Text: We apply real-time tracking technology, smart warehouse management (WMS), and electronic customs declaration.
WhyChooseUs.point2Text: Our experienced experts are always ready to provide consultation and 24/7 support.
WhyChooseUs.point3Text: Located right at Tà Lùng International Border Gate, the vital trade link between Vietnam and China.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.description: We are always ready to listen. Connect with Tà Lùng Logistics using the information below or send your request via the contact form.

faq.q1: What are the company's working hours?
faq.a1: Administrative office operates from 8:00 - 17:00 (Monday - Saturday). However, our on-site team at Tà Lùng International Border Gate works 24/7 to ensure smooth customs clearance.
faq.q2: How can I track my shipment?
faq.a2: You can use the 'Tracking' feature in the menu bar, enter the AWB number to view real-time status, or contact the Hotline for assistance.
faq.q3: Does Tà Lùng Logistics handle less-than-container-load (LCL) shipments?
faq.a3: Yes. We provide both LCL consolidation and full-container-load (FCL) solutions for two-way Vietnam-China transport with optimized costs and stable schedules.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Use
TermsPage.content:
Welcome to the official website of Tà Lùng Logistics (Phú Anh Trading and Transportation Co., Ltd).

By accessing and using the website talunglogistics.com, you agree to comply with the terms and conditions outlined below.

### 1. USER RIGHTS AND RESPONSIBILITIES
- Users are responsible for providing accurate information when using quote request or contact forms.
- Any actions aimed at damaging, attacking, or unauthorized access to the system are strictly prohibited.

### 2. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
- All content, images, and trademarks on this website are owned by Tà Lùng Logistics.
- Copying or using any material without written permission constitutes a violation.

### 3. DISCLAIMER
- Information on the website is provided for reference purposes only. We are not liable for any losses arising from the use of this information.

### 4. CHANGES TO TERMS
Tà Lùng Logistics reserves the right to modify these terms at any time.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.content:
Tà Lùng Logistics is committed to protecting your personal information.

This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you visit our website.

### 1. INFORMATION COLLECTION
We collect information you provide through contact forms, including: Full name, email, phone number.

### 2. USE OF INFORMATION
Your information is used to contact you, respond to requests, and improve service quality.

### 3. SECURITY AND SHARING
We commit not to share your information with any third party without your consent, except where required by law.

### 4. YOUR RIGHTS
You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us at **info@talunglogistics.com**.
